posts.title: An Ordinary Person's PhD Application Journey: Prologue

posts.title: Notes on Geometric Perception for Large-Scale Robotic Systems

posts.title: A Practical Research Workflow from Prototype to Manuscript
posts.summary: A compact example of how to move from an experimental idea to a repeatable implementation and a clearer paper draft.
